title: stelis crescentiicola
intro: Stelis crescentiicola is a species of orchid native to Mexico and Central America. It is a type of epiphytic orchid, which is a plant that grows on other plants or surfaces without deriving nutrients from them. The medicinal properties of Stelis crescentiicola include its ability to be used as an anti-inflammatory and to have antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and prevent infections. The health benefits of Stelis crescentiicola include its potential use in the treatment of various health conditions, such as respiratory issues and skin problems, and it can be prepared as a tea or infused oil for topical use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
